description: Bifolio of miscellaneous text in both Arabic script and Judaeo-Arabic, including commercial accounts, letter drafts, and poetry and/or aphorisms. One part refers to a wise Muslim and an enemy of the Jews (מסלם עאקל . . . עדו אליהוד), but the context is unclear. Needs further examination.
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
